---
title: High-Performance and Energy-Efficient Mobile Web Browsing on Big/Little Systems
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/hpca13.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/little-systems
journ: HPCA
year: 2013
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 5
---
